metadata.title: Andri Amaro · Full Stack Developer
metadata.description: Full Stack Developer specialized in React, Next.js and Node.js. Creator of the Pulse Ecosystem · a design system with 100+ components powering 3 SaaS apps in production, 380+ automated tests.

roles: AI Systems Builder · Multi-provider LLMs with fallback

hero.description: Full Stack Developer specialized in multi-tenant SaaS with native AI. Building <highlight>Sellorex</highlight> · B2B SaaS with 107 models, 1036 endpoints, 12 AI agents orchestrated via multi-provider gateway with fallback. Plus the <highlight>Pulse Ecosystem</highlight> · 4 production-ready SaaS, 380+ tests, 740+ commits.
hero.descriptionText: · B2B SaaS with 107 models, 1036 endpoints, 12 AI agents orchestrated via multi-provider gateway with fallback.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Who I am, what I've built, and how I can help with your next project
about.heading: Product-oriented
about.paragraph1: I'm a Full Stack Developer focused on React, Next.js and Node.js. I don't just build screens or isolated APIs · I design and implement complete applications, from the design system to production deployment.
about.paragraph2suffix: from scratch: a design system with 100+ components that serves as the foundation for multiple production apps · dashboards, real-time platforms, marketplaces and more to come.
about.paragraph3: Every project has documented architecture, automated tests, CI/CD configured and technical decisions recorded in ADRs. It's not just code that works · it's code that scales and that other devs can maintain.

architecture.title: Complete Architecture
architecture.description: From design system to deploy. Tokens, components, pages, API, database and cache in a single ecosystem.

tests.title: 380+ Tests
tests.description: Unit, integration and e2e with Vitest and Testing Library. Real coverage, not just padding numbers.

docs.title: Technical Documentation
docs.description: ADRs, SVG diagrams, scaling guides. Every architectural decision is documented and justified.

deploy.title: Continuous Deployment
deploy.description: CI/CD with GitHub Actions, automatic deploy on Vercel and Railway, conventional commits across all repos.

skills.title: My
skills.subtitle: Technologies I use to build high-quality digital products

aiBadge.text: AI for Development, Code Review and Automation

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Each project is a complete case study · from problem to solution, with documented architecture, tests and automated deploy

pulseDs.description: Production-grade design system with Atomic Design, 25 dashboard variants, custom SVG animations and full accessibility with Radix UI.
pulseDs.problem: Repeated components in every project, with no visual consistency or real reuse.
pulseDs.solution: Unified design system with tokens, primitives and patterns that powers all SaaS apps in the ecosystem.

pulseChat.description: Full-stack chat with WebSocket, 32 typed events, offline queue with exponential retry and 40+ components adapted from the Design System.
pulseChat.problem: Going beyond CRUD · real-time communication with concurrent state and resilience.
pulseChat.solution: Event-driven architecture with end-to-end type safety and automatic recovery mechanisms.

pulseFinance.description: Multi-tenant financial SaaS with Clean Architecture, type-safe Hono API, Redis cache and background jobs with BullMQ.
pulseFinance.problem: Demonstrate production-ready architecture with multi-tenancy, cache and async processing.
pulseFinance.solution: Clean Architecture with defined layers, Redis for performance and BullMQ for heavy jobs.

codeInAction.title: Code in
codeInAction.subtitle: Real code from ecosystem projects · no lorem ipsum

timeline.title: My
timeline.subtitle: Self-taught by choice, Full Stack by dedication · every course became a project, every project became a product, and consistency did the rest

start.title: The First Step
start.description: I decided to learn web development on my own. No bootcamp, no shortcuts · I started from the basics because solid fundamentals are what separate those who code from those who solve problems.
achievements: HTML, CSS and JavaScript from scratch
First contact with React and TypeScript

courses.title: Continuous Learning
courses.description: I invested time and resources in courses to accelerate learning and fill technical gaps. Each course was a stepping stone · real knowledge solidified when I started applying everything in my own projects.

practice.title: Practice Projects
practice.description: Theory without practice is half-knowledge. I built dozens of small projects to solidify each concept: REST APIs, authentication, CRUD, database integration.
achievements: REST APIs with Express and Prisma

pulseDs.title: Pulse Design System
pulseDs.description: With a solid foundation built, I wanted to go beyond study projects. I created a complete design system from scratch · not a copied library, but 100+ components designed to scale.
achievements: i18n with pathname routing in 3 languages

pulseChat.title: Pulse Chat · Real-Time
pulseChat.description: Full-stack real-time app from the ecosystem. WebSocket with 32 typed events, offline queue and 98 tests. Solving real-time problems in production taught more than any course.

pulseFinance.title: Pulse Finance · Clean Architecture
pulseFinance.description: Multi-tenant financial dashboard with real clean architecture. Well-defined layers, Redis cache, background jobs · the level of complexity that separates study projects from real products.

ecosystem.title: Complete Pulse Ecosystem
ecosystem.description: The projects connected into a real ecosystem. Shared design tokens, 380+ tests, CI/CD across all repos. It's not just code · it's architecture that scales.
achievements: SaaS apps connected through design tokens
CI/CD with GitHub Actions across all repos

timeline.nextTeaser: Next: 3 more apps in the ecosystem

ecosystem.title: The
ecosystem.subtitle: These aren't isolated projects · it's an ecosystem where the Design System feeds every application, with shared tokens, components and patterns

pulseDs.tagline: Ecosystem foundation · exports tokens, components and layouts to all apps

pulseChat.tagline: Consumes tokens and 40+ components from the DS · adds real-time layer

pulseFinance.tagline: Inherits dashboard variants and data components from the DS · adds cache layer

vexiat.tagline: Project management SaaS with Kanban, Stripe billing and granular RBAC

pulseMarket.tagline: Multi-vendor marketplace with Stripe Connect, split payments and search engine

pulseAi.tagline: Intelligent assistant with RAG pipeline and autonomous agents

services.title: How I can
services.subtitle: From MVP to scalable product · I deliver complete applications with the same quality and rigor I apply to the Pulse Ecosystem

frontend.title: Frontend Development
frontend.description: Performant interfaces with React and Next.js · design systems, dashboards, landing pages and SPAs with accessibility and premium animations.

backend.title: Backend & APIs
backend.description: Type-safe APIs with Node.js, relational database, cache, queues and scalable architecture. From MVP to multi-tenant.

fullstack.title: Full Stack Apps
fullstack.description: Complete applications from design to deploy · frontend, backend, database, CI/CD and monitoring. All in a single package.

designSystem.title: Design Systems
designSystem.description: Reusable design systems with tokens, compound components and documentation. The same approach as Pulse DS with 100+ components.

conversation.title: Conversation
conversation.description: I understand the problem, scope and expectations

development.title: Development
development.description: Sprints with partial deliveries and continuous feedback

cta.title: Have a project in mind?
cta.description: Let's talk about how I can turn your idea into a real, scalable product.

contact.title: Let's build something
contact.subtitle: From concept to deploy · I turn ideas into digital products with clean code and scalable architecture
contact.nextStepDescription: Whether it's an MVP, a SaaS platform or a complete refactor · I work with full dedication on every project, applying the same practices I use in the Pulse Ecosystem.
